zh.lifeSummary: 當Lettice於1310年出生在英國時，她的父親John de Criol23歲，母親Lettice de Echingham19歲。她和Sir John de Criol至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1408年9月22日在她的家鄉享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lettice于1310年出生在英国时，她的父亲John de Criol23岁，母亲Lettice de Echingham19岁。她和Sir John de Criol至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1408年9月22日在她的家乡享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lettice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval vernacular form of the Latin name   Laetitia .  It was in use in Britain in the Middle Ages, but then fell out of use until revived by the Victorians. It is now once again out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lettice was born in 1310, in England, her father, John de Criol, was 23 and her mother, Lettice de Echingham, was 19. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sir John de Criol. She died on 22 September 1408, in her hometown, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lettice est née en 1310, à Angleterre, son père, John de Criol, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lettice d’Echingham, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Sir John de Criol. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1408, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lettice 1310 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Criol 23 und ihre Mutter Lettice de Echingham 19. Sie hatte mit Sir John de Criol mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. September 1408 im Alter von 98 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice è nata il nel 1310 nel England, sua padre, John de Criol, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Lettice de Echingham, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Sir John de Criol. Morì il 22 settembre 1408, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Letticeが1310年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John de Criolは23歳，母Lettice de Echinghamは19歳であった。彼女はSir John de Criolとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1408年9月22日に故郷で98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lettice(이)가 1310년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Criol(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lettice de Echingham(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Sir John de Criol(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 9월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice nasceu em 1310, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Criol, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lettice de Echingham, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir John de Criol. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1408, em sua cidade natal, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lettice родилась в 1310 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John de Criol было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lettice de Echingham, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Sir John de Criol. Она умерла 22 сентября 1408 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lettice nació en 1310, en Inglaterra, su papá, John de Criol, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Lettice de Echingham, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir John de Criol. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1408, en su pueblo, a la edad de 98 años.
